feed.title: Yijie21
feed.subtitle: A minimal, responsive, and powerful Jekyll theme for presenting professional writing.

entry.title: [Paper Reading] NPBG++: Accelerating Neural Point-Based Graphics

link.title: [Paper Reading] NPBG++: Accelerating Neural Point-Based Graphics

entry.summary: A new system for the novel view synthesis task that achieves high rendering realism with low scene fitting time. Abstract Problem Intro A point-based rendering method with high efficiency. Method Overview Predict a neural discriptor for each point. Results Outperform previous NVS approaches in terms of fitting ans rendering runtimes. Claim Able to work directly on raw point geometry an...

entry.title: [Paper Reading] Learning A Unified 3D Point Cloud for View Synthesis

link.title: [Paper Reading] Learning A Unified 3D Point Cloud for View Synthesis

entry.summary: A point-based neural rendering method. Abstract Problem Intro To render high-quality novel view using rich information such as point clouds. Method Overview Fisrt construct sub-point clouds by projecting source views to 3D space based on theire depth maps. Then, learn the unified 3D point cloud by adaptively fusing points at a local neighborhood. Finally, a 3D geometry-guided image re...

entry.title: [Paper Reading] NeuS: Learning Neural Implicit Surfaces by Volume Rendering for Multi-view Reconstruction

link.title: [Paper Reading] NeuS: Learning Neural Implicit Surfaces by Volume Rendering for Multi-view Reconstruction

entry.summary: A novel neural surface reconstruction method for high-fidelity reconstruction from 2D image inputs. Abstract Problem Intro The first NeRF-variant for surface reconstruction. Method Overview Represent a surface as the zero-level set of a SDF. A new volume rendering method to train a neural SDF representation. A new formulation that is free of bias in the first order of approximation. ...

entry.title: [Paper Reading] Center-based 3D Object Detection and Tracking

link.title: [Paper Reading] Center-based 3D Object Detection and Tracking

entry.summary: Propose to represent, detect and track 3D objects as points. Abstract Problem Intro Objects in a 3D world do not follow any particular orientation, and box-based detectors have difficulties enumerating all orientations or fitting an axis-aligned bounding box to rotated objects. So to solve this ambiguity, this paper represents objects as points. Method Overview Use a keypoint detector to ...

entry.title: [Leetcode] 第18场双周赛
entry.summary: 第一题：数组序号转换 1331 Solution1 - 哈希 class Solution { public: vector<int> arrayRankTransform(vector<int>& arr) { vector<int> b = arr; sort(b.begin(), b.end()); b.erase(unique(b.begin(), b.end()), b.end()); for(auto &x: arr) { x = upper_bound(b.begin(), b.end(), x) - b.begin(); } return arr; } }; 思路 从输出来看，...
